title: fumaria numidica var. erosa
intro: Fumaria numidica var. erosa is a subspecies of the Fumaria numidica plant, a species of flowering plant in the poppy family (Papaveraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Fumaria numidica var. erosa include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Fumaria numidica var. erosa can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically used to treat respiratory and skin conditions.
